stages.title: Brainstorm (HIL front-door)
stages.description: Human-in-the-loop front-door: the feature brief is produced here and consumed by all downstream phases; no engine leaf worker runs.

stages.title: Validate (brief + bootstrap)
stages.description: Engine validates the brainstorm brief (exists, parses, carries uiFeature marker) and runs the project-bootstrap leaf to confirm the repo is ready for the feature.

stages.title: Epic authoring
stages.description: Drafts the umbrella epic issue from the validated brief; child issues are created first so the epic can link their finalized numbers.

stages.title: Figma design
stages.description: Produces Figma design mocks on the designated WIP page; skipped (rendered as 'skipped (backend feature)') when uiFeature is false.

stages.title: Figma design review
stages.description: Inspects the Figma mocks against DESIGN.md tokens and motion values; skipped when uiFeature is false; gates on a Figma-Design-Verdict before fan-out.

stages.title: Issue fan-out
stages.description: Creates all child implementation issues from the spec paths; the epic issue is created last to link the finalized child numbers.

stages.title: Plan review
stages.description: Posts a fresh-context plan review comment on each child issue via julianken-bot before implementation starts; no rubber-stamping.

stages.title: Implementation
stages.description: Dispatches one scoped subagent per child issue, each in its own worktree; runs in parallel where children are independent.

stages.title: PR creation
stages.description: Each implementer opens a violin-tools PR and (where applicable) an agentic-seed mirror PR following the five-section PR body discipline.

stages.title: PR review
stages.description: Fresh-context reviewer posts as julianken-bot; verifies CI gates, doc-currency, screenshot fidelity, and anti-slop criteria before approving.

stages.title: Merge
stages.description: Squash-merge via Mergify (@Mergifyio queue comment); requires a fresh bot approval per HEAD; no direct gh pr merge.

stages.title: Deploy
stages.description: Post-merge: CI publishes static assets to GCS; Cloudflare edge propagates; soft-launch ritual in GAPS.md gates promotion to required checks.
